title: Frontend Mortys miss CSS-Grid min-width:auto edge-case
source_context: Tweede UX-iteratie op CMO Orchestrator memo detail page; pre code-block met lange JSONL-regels pushte page-width.
description: When dispatching frontend agents for layouts using CSS Grid (Tailwind grid-cols-[1fr_X]), agents miss the default min-width:auto on grid items. A wide child (code-block, table, image) forces the column wider than the viewport, causing horizontal page overflow. Generic lesson: always use minmax(0,1fr) for the flexible column AND add min-w-0 on the grid item itself when content may exceed it.
proposed_changes: Add to frontend-Morty/Peggy agent card: bij CSS Grid met flexibele kolommen ALTIJD minmax(0,1fr) + min-w-0 op grid item, OOK voor flex children (flex-1 min-w-0). Voorkomt 90% van horizontale page-overflow bugs.
reject_reason: No target_files specified — Prometheus cannot delegate a concrete modification. Proposal likely belongs in a knowledge base or decision log, not the evolution queue.
